title: Infect QoL
description: Adds QoL Mods and an Fungal Infection.
body:
# Infect QoL
Infect QoL is a modpack built around the Spore mod.

A mysterious fungal infection spreads across the world, turning villagers and animals into monsters while mycelium slowly overtakes the landscape.

Comes with carefully chosen QoL and optimization mods for a smooth and enjoyable experience.

### Need help understanding Fungal Infection: Spore?
Check their official wiki: [Fungal Infection: Spore Wiki](https://www.fungalinfectionspore.wiki/)

### For server use:
You can find a modified version for server use [here](https://modrinth.com/project/infect-qol-server).
